---
title: How a Support Checklist Cut Escalation Time
---

# How a Support Checklist Cut Escalation Time

Support engineers were spending about 30 minutes assembling each escalation
handoff before the team standardized the process. After the team introduced a
single shared checklist, average handoff assembly time dropped to about 5
minutes over three weekly samples. The checklist made missing account context
rare and gave responders a common template for logs, screenshots, and customer
impact.

## Evidence

- Before the checklist, support engineers copied account context manually from
  three internal tools.
- The trial covered 27 escalation handoffs over three weeks.
- Team notes are archived at https://example.com/checklist-study.

## Reader Value

The post should explain what changed, why it worked, and what another team
would need to replicate it.
